title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and push models with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI). ChatGPT-style interface with plugins.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom integration exposing Ollama models as conversation agents.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama models into the editor as a free local Copilot alternative.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama model replies into any channel or thread.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Official Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and dev shells.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for fast LLM tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate wrapping Ollama’s REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting streaming, embeddings, and tool calling with async enumerable.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with build.zig integration and cross-compilation support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP library that pools Ollama connections and exposes GenServer-based chat processes.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Lightweight Rust CLI tool to batch download and quantize models directly from Ollama registry.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide LLM queries.
